title: Cobblemon - Advanced Move inspector
description: Cobblemon – Move Inspector is a lightweight addon for Cobblemon that enhances the battle interface by showing detailed information about each move directly in combat.
body:
# Cobblemon - Advanced Move inspector

**Modloader:** Fabric  

## Overview

**Move Info Overlay** is a quality-of-life mod for **Cobblemon** that adds a detailed tooltip interface when selecting moves during battle. It provides crucial information like type, category, accuracy, and effectiveness in a clean, accessible way.

This mod is perfect for competitive players and casual fans alike who want to make better decisions in battle without leaving the game screen.

![Preview of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ff3d7079f536e1e0e5b75b27ce4d106a2b466e6.png)

## Features

### 🧠 Contextual Move Information
When you're in a battle and hovering over a move, a tooltip appears displaying:
- **Move Name**
- **Type** (e.g., Grass, Fire, Psychic)
- **Category** (Physical, Special, or Status)
- **Accuracy**
- **Effect** (e.g., heals user, inflicts status, etc.)
- **Effectiveness** against the current target

### 🎯 Effectiveness Insights
The tooltip dynamically calculates type effectiveness based on the opponent's type(s), showing:
- **Effectiveness multiplier** (e.g., 0.5x, 1x, 2x)
- **Opponent's type** for reference

This helps players decide whether the move is worth using or if another one would be more effective.

![Preview of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ecf1e38afd8f955ad5928db2baaf70b9e8d68c6.png)

## Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/) for Minecraft 1.20.1.
2. Install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
3. Download and install [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon).
4. Drop the `CobblemonMoveInspector` mod `.jar` file into your `/mods` folder.

> ⚠️ Requires **Cobblemon** to function. This is an addon, not a standalone mod.

## Compatibility

- ✅ Fabric 1.20.1
- ❌ Not compatible with Forge
- ❌ Not compatible with versions of Minecraft below 1.20.1

## Roadmap

- [x] Base tooltip with move info
- [x] Effectiveness logic
- [ ] Configurable themes or tooltip styles

## License

This mod is open-source under the MIT License. Contributions and pull requests are welcome!
